ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1649. In the academy he discussed the following problems: `Quale nelle miserie sia il piu` felice ricovero`, and `Qual sia la strada piu` breve per arrivar alla gloria`.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
